race.description: Fore Design + Flex Planning Maiden Plate
race.comment: GIN EXPLOSION (10) was collared late on debut back in August by the promising Virtual Illusion, then was spelled right away. Looks to have come on a treat during the break, winning her last three hitouts. Will bounce to the front and take plenty of running down. BABYLON BLUE (8) is a gelding by Blue Point from the stakes-winner Don'tbabylon on debut. Placed in his latest trial so he looks to have ability and gets Holder. Taking seriously. HEART OF THE MED (11) is another debutant and is a daughter of Flying Artie. Has come along nicely in her lead-up work and gets a key booking in Milnes. Can measure up at first outing. COSMIC INTERLUDE (9) didn't fire a shot when resuming well in the market in town last month, turning a long way off the pace and never running on. Was too bad to be true, so willing to give another chance.
